body.title: Akien+Claude design-discussion thread for Pass-2 findings that need design calls
body.result: Closed per Akien 2026-05-03: placeholder for T-epic-fix-all-pass2-findings; that epic covers the actual work.
body.description:
Companion to T-epic-fix-all-pass2-findings. Tracks the subset of Pass-2 findings that neither Igor nor CC can resolve alone — they need a design call between Akien and CC.

**How it works:**
- Child epic tickets tagged `needs-design` surface here before sprinting.
- Each design call produces a D-* decision via `/decided`. D-id is appended to this ticket's body with one-line rationale + which child ticket(s) it resolved.
- This ticket stays OPEN for the full duration of the Pass-2 batch. It closes when T-epic-fix-all-pass2-findings closes.

**Known design-needing findings already visible (more will surface as we go):**
- Engram identity question: ensembles refactor vs retire vocabulary. Default per `feedback_biology_commitment.md`: implement real mechanism (ensembles).
- Hebbian commitment: enable real bridge + replay-based sleep vs retract from docstrings. Same default.
- Safety-gate bypass via SYSCFG env_sync (Pass 2 area_4). HIGH-inertia implications.
- `decision_manager.py:75` + silent-`except Exception` family — policy on how aggressively to purge swallow-and-noop patterns.

**Scope boundary:**
- In: design calls on Pass-2 findings during this epic. D-* rollups recorded here.
- Out: design calls on non-Pass-2 topics. Those get their own decision rollups.
- Out: single-ticket design pre-approvals (HIGH-inertia checks at /review time are a different flow).

**Design rules:** no persistence (tracking ticket — decisions themselves live in the palace at theigors/decisions/D-* which this ticket just indexes); test-plan n/a (no code); docs-in-code n/a.

**Test plan:** no new tests. Verification = at epic closure, every design-call-needing finding has an associated D-* id linked here.

**Trip condition (per `feedback_no_immobile_observe_tickets.md`):** this ticket closes when its companion T-epic-fix-all-pass2-findings closes. Not immobile — gated on real event.
